$comment: #17 verified Modelfile registry — deployed==source attestation (mirrors dispatch #83). manifest_id = the `ollama list` identity a consumer attests against the running model; base_digest = the FROM blob the build is pinned to. The two are DISTINCT digests; conflating them is silent drift (caught here for wave-devstral2). Pulled live from Studio 2026-05-30 via SSH.

models.$drift_fixed: champions.json previously stored the manifest_id (64ff1533392b) in base_digest — corrected to the real FROM blob c580819bed79

models.$note: shares granite base blob with wave-granite4 (consolidation confirmed)
{{ .Prompt }} passthrough but GLM GGUF embeds its chat template so it works; #16 should still give it the native GLM template. NOT yet promoted to :latest (pending Jake).

broken.fix: upgrade ollama + retest; re-pull compatible quant

broken.fault: unable to load (blob sha256-0dedd21a185d intact 40G; arch newer than ollama 0.24.0)

attestation.method: consumer pins manifest_id; on model pull/refresh, compare `ollama list` ID against this registry; mismatch => drift alert (block route until re-verified). base_digest pins the build provenance for the steering-probe + bench re-seal.
attestation.next: #20 dispatch reads this + champions.json as routing source of truth
